default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review feedback on competitive articles and align on a new process.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Misses the Mark:** The Jamf article was rejected for being factually incorrect and recommending a competitor. The core issue is that GrowthX's neutral pipeline fails to support Fleet's strategic goal of proving MDM parity.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**New Process Defined:** Brock will now provide line-by-line feedback in GitHub comments, not full rewrites. GrowthX will use this to refine its content pipeline and accelerate reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Critical Resources Unlocked:** GrowthX will receive the Jamf battle card and the company's competitive matrix, which are essential for creating accurate, factual comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Urgent Pipeline Fix:** GrowthX will immediately build a new pipeline for competitive articles to ensure they consistently position Fleet as the superior solution, not a neutral alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Content Fails Strategic Goal

  - [The Jamf article was rejected for being factually incorrect and recommending a competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Prove Fleet's MDM feature parity with competitors like Jamf.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Counter market misinformation (e.g., AI search results stating "Fleet is not an MDM").](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Required Tone:** Honest comparisons that always position Fleet as the superior choice.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** GrowthX's neutral content pipeline is misaligned with this strategic goal.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Solution: New Process & Resources

  - [**New Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Brock will provide line-by-line feedback in GitHub comments.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This enables GrowthX to make precise, tool-assisted edits, accelerating the review cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [**New Resources for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Jamf battle card](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Company-wide competitive matrix](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These internal documents provide the accurate, factual data needed to build credible comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**New Article Template:**](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Comparison articles are now landing pages with a specific, mobile-responsive format.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This requires a strict structure, including a single comparison table at the top and 4–10 FAQ questions.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Brock's edited Jamf article is the new model; he will provide a Figma wireframe screenshot.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### Example: "Linux MDM" Search Term

  - [**Challenge:** A search term like "Linux MDM" is technically inaccurate but has high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use the term in the headline to capture traffic, then educate the user in the article about the correct terminology and Fleet's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Process:** Brock will flag these terms in GitHub comments, indicating the need for an educational correction within the content.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Share the Jamf battle card and competitive matrix with Erik and Gabrielle.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Send a screenshot of the new comparison landing page template.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [Begin providing line-by-line feedback in GitHub comments.](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/VbVNVKYfWYTF-S8DX2NnTWfx7YvmMGFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
